privileged_info_summary: The transaction-service project is a synthetic Maven-based Java 17 application located at /home/ga/transaction-service containing four key classes: TransactionService, FeeCalculator, TransactionValidator, and AccountService. The project has zero initial test files and uses JUnit 5 with Mockito as the testing framework. The minimum code coverage requirement is 70% line coverage. JaCoCo reports are expected at target/site/jacoco/index.html (HTML) and target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml (XML). All metadata claims have been independently verified against the actual project structure, pom.xml configuration, and shell scripts.
